meta.subtitle: Component & workflow map
meta.description: Every node below is a real package/component in the app (ovh.battistella.ondes.*). Pick a workflow on the left to light up the components it touches and see, step by step, what each one hands to the next.

layers.label: Repository · single source of truth (data/repository, data/settings)
Services · playback / sync / download / import-export (playback, sync, download, data/opml, data/backup)

flows.title: Subscribe to a podcast
flows.summary: From a search result (or a pasted RSS URL) to a fully reconciled show in the user's library.

steps.label: subscribe(feedUrl)
steps.note: SearchViewModel calls PodcastRepository.subscribe() with the chosen feed URL.

steps.label: fetchAndParse(feedUrl)
steps.note: subscribe() delegates to refreshFeed(markSubscribed = true), which asks RssParser to fetch and parse the feed.

steps.label: GET feed XML
steps.note: RssParser uses the shared OkHttpClient to download the raw feed.

steps.label: HTTP request
steps.note: OkHttp hits the podcast host and streams back the RSS/Atom document.

steps.label: ParsedFeed(title, author, episodes…)
steps.note: Parsed metadata + episode list returns to the repository.

steps.label: podcastDao.upsert(subscribed=true) + episode upserts
steps.note: Repository reconciles the show and its episodes into Room, flagging it subscribed; known episodes keep their played/position state.

steps.label: observeSubscriptions() Flow emits
steps.note: LibraryViewModel observes a Room Flow, so the new show appears instantly without a manual refresh.

steps.label: Result<String> → confirmation
steps.note: The Result is surfaced to the UI; SnackbarController shows success / error feedback.

flows.title: Play an episode
flows.summary: Tapping play hands an episode to the foreground media service and starts saving progress.

steps.label: play(episode, queue)
steps.note: PlayerViewModel calls PlaybackConnection.play() with the episode (and optional surrounding queue).

steps.label: read default + per-podcast speed
steps.note: PlaybackConnection resolves the playback speed: per-podcast override if set, otherwise the user's default.

steps.label: MediaController.setMediaItems(); play()
steps.note: Episode(s) are converted to MediaItems and sent to PlaybackService over the MediaController session, seeking to the saved position.

steps.label: prepare + play audio
steps.note: PlaybackService drives ExoPlayer and applies skip-silence / volume-boost audio effects.

steps.label: MediaSession notification
steps.note: The MediaSession publishes lock-screen / notification transport controls.

steps.label: savePosition(id, positionMs, durationMs)
steps.note: A position saver periodically writes progress back to Room so the user can resume later.

steps.label: observeInProgress() emits
steps.note: Home's "Continue listening" row reads the in-progress Flow and stays in sync.

flows.title: Download an episode
flows.summary: Offline download via a WorkManager job that survives the app being closed.

steps.label: enqueue(episodeId)
steps.note: From the podcast / downloads UI, DownloadManager.enqueue() is called with the episode id.

steps.label: OneTimeWorkRequest(KEY_EPISODE_ID)
steps.note: DownloadManager enqueues unique work (KEEP policy) carrying the episode id as input data.

steps.label: doWork() — Wi-Fi constraint honoured
steps.note: WorkManager runs EpisodeDownloadWorker when constraints (e.g. Wi-Fi-only) are met, even if the app is closed.

steps.label: updateDownload(DOWNLOADING)
steps.note: Worker flips the episode's download state so the UI shows progress.

steps.label: stream audio bytes
steps.note: Worker streams the audio file through the shared OkHttpClient, retrying transient 429/5xx errors.

steps.label: write file
steps.note: Bytes are written to app storage as the local copy.

steps.label: foreground progress notification
steps.note: Worker runs as a foreground service with a progress notification.

steps.label: updateDownload(DOWNLOADED, localPath)
steps.note: On success the episode is marked DOWNLOADED with its local path (FAILED / QUEUED on error).

steps.label: persist downloadState
steps.note: Repository writes the final state into Room.

steps.label: observeDownloaded() emits
steps.note: Downloads screen observes the downloaded Flow and lists the now-offline episode.

flows.title: Background refresh + new-episode notification
flows.summary: A periodic job checks every subscription, notifies on new episodes, and can auto-download them.

steps.label: enqueueUniquePeriodicWork (every N h, Wi-Fi)
steps.note: FeedRefreshScheduler schedules a periodic, network-constrained job (cancelled when the user disables background refresh).

steps.label: doWork()
steps.note: WorkManager wakes FeedRefreshWorker on schedule.

steps.label: refreshSubscriptionsForNew()
steps.note: Worker asks the repository to refresh every subscribed feed and report only genuinely new episodes.

steps.label: fetchAndParse(each feed)
steps.note: Repository re-parses each subscribed feed (via RssParser → OkHttp → host).

steps.label: upsert new episodes
steps.note: New episodes are written to Room; existing ones keep their state.

steps.label: notify(new batches)
steps.note: Worker hands the batches of new episodes to NewEpisodeNotifier.

steps.label: system notification
steps.note: A grouped "new episodes" notification is posted.

steps.label: enqueue() if podcast.autoDownload
steps.note: For shows with auto-download on, the worker enqueues each new episode — handing off to the Download flow.

flows.title: Import OPML
flows.summary: Bulk-subscribe from a standard OPML file exported by another podcast app.

steps.label: pick .opml document
steps.note: Settings opens the system file picker (SAF); the chosen document's InputStream is opened.

steps.label: import(inputStream)
steps.note: SettingsViewModel passes the stream to OpmlManager.import().

steps.label: subscribe(feedUrl) per entry
steps.note: OpmlManager parses the outline and subscribes to each listed feed, skipping ones already subscribed.

steps.label: fetchAndParse(feedUrl)
steps.note: Each subscribe() fetches & parses that feed (RssParser → OkHttp → host).

steps.label: upsert podcasts + episodes
steps.note: Every imported show is reconciled into Room.

steps.label: observeSubscriptions() emits
steps.note: The whole imported library appears as the Flow emits; OpmlManager returns the count added.

flows.title: Export OPML
flows.summary: Write the user's subscriptions out as a portable, lock-in-free OPML file.

steps.label: create .opml document
steps.note: Settings asks the system for a destination document; its OutputStream is opened.

steps.label: export(outputStream)
steps.note: SettingsViewModel calls OpmlManager.export().

steps.label: getSubscriptionsOnce()
steps.note: OpmlManager reads the current subscriptions snapshot from the repository.

steps.label: podcastDao query
steps.note: Repository reads subscribed shows from Room.

steps.label: write OPML XML
steps.note: OpmlManager serialises the shows to OPML and writes them to the chosen file; returns the count exported.

flows.title: Backup / Restore
flows.summary: A full JSON snapshot of subscriptions, listening progress, queue and settings — so a reinstall keeps everything.

steps.label: export(out) / import(in)
steps.note: Settings drives BackupManager with a SAF stream for the backup file.

steps.label: read/write podcasts, episodes, queue (DAOs)
steps.note: BackupManager talks directly to the DAOs to dump or restore library, per-episode progress and the Up-Next queue.

steps.label: read/write settings (theme, speed…)
steps.note: User preferences are included in the same snapshot via SettingsRepository.

steps.label: JSON backup document
steps.note: Everything is serialised to / read from a single JSON document on disk.

flows.title: Search / Discover podcasts
flows.summary: Free-text search and theme charts powered by the public iTunes APIs — no key, no account.

steps.label: search(term) / topPodcasts(genreId)
steps.note: SearchViewModel asks the repository to search by name/author or fetch a theme's top shows.

steps.label: PodcastSearchService.search()
steps.note: Repository delegates to PodcastSearchService, which builds the iTunes storefront URL.

steps.label: GET itunes.apple.com/search|lookup
steps.note: The service calls iTunes over OkHttp and parses the JSON, de-duplicating by feed URL.

steps.label: HTTP request
steps.note: OkHttp performs the request against Apple's public endpoints.

steps.label: List<PodcastSearchResult>
steps.note: Clean, de-duplicated results return to the repository.

steps.label: Result<List<…>> → UI list
steps.note: SearchViewModel renders the results; each can feed the Subscribe flow.

flows.title: Sleep timer
flows.summary: Stop playback after a fixed duration, or at the end of the current episode.

steps.label: start(durationMs) / startEndOfEpisode()
steps.note: PlayerViewModel injects SleepTimer directly and arms it from the timer sheet.

steps.label: remainingMs / endOfEpisodeArmed StateFlow
steps.note: SleepTimer exposes countdown StateFlows the Player UI displays live.

steps.label: pause() on expiry
steps.note: When the countdown hits zero (or the episode ends), SleepTimer calls PlaybackConnection.pause().

steps.label: MediaController.pause()
steps.note: The pause is relayed to the media service.

steps.label: ExoPlayer.pause()
steps.note: ExoPlayer stops and the notification updates.

flows.title: Up-Next queue
flows.summary: A persistent, reorderable play queue ("Play next" / "Add to queue").

steps.label: addToQueueEnd / playNextInQueue / setQueueOrder
steps.note: QueueViewModel mutates the queue through the repository's queue operations.

steps.label: queueDao writes (sortIndex)
steps.note: The repository persists ordering in the Room queue table, so it survives restarts.

steps.label: observeQueue() emits
steps.note: The Queue screen observes the queue Flow and re-renders on every change.

steps.label: playFromQueue(queue, startIndex)
steps.note: Starting playback hands the whole ordered queue to PlaybackConnection.

steps.label: setMediaItems(queue)
steps.note: PlaybackService loads the queue into ExoPlayer for continuous, gapless next-up playback.

flows.title: Android Auto browse & play
flows.summary: The car head-unit browses Continue / Subscriptions / Downloads and plays hands-free.

steps.label: onGetLibraryRoot / onGetChildren(parentId)
steps.note: Android Auto connects to PlaybackService (a MediaLibraryService) and requests the browse tree.

steps.label: root() / children(parentId)
steps.note: PlaybackService delegates browse requests to MediaLibraryTree, after verifying the caller is trusted.

steps.label: getSubscriptionsOnce / inProgress / downloaded
steps.note: The tree pulls the right episode lists from the repository for each folder.

steps.label: DAO queries
steps.note: Repository reads from Room.

steps.label: List<MediaItem> (browsable tree)
steps.note: Folders + playable items are returned for the car UI to render.

steps.label: onAddMediaItems → play
steps.note: Selecting an item adds it to ExoPlayer and starts playback — reusing the Play flow.

flows.title: First-run onboarding
flows.summary: The interest picker seeds a brand-new library from iTunes theme charts.

steps.label: topPodcasts(genreId) per picked interest
steps.note: OnboardingViewModel asks the repository for top shows in each interest the user picked.

steps.label: topPodcasts → iTunes charts
steps.note: PodcastSearchService reads the genre chart (via OkHttp → iTunes) and returns suggested shows.

steps.label: subscribe(feedUrl) for chosen shows
steps.note: Each show the user keeps is subscribed — reusing the Subscribe flow (parse → Room).

steps.label: seed library + episodes
steps.note: The picked shows and their episodes are written to Room.

steps.label: mark onboarding complete
steps.note: A settings flag flips so onboarding never shows again.

steps.label: observeLatest() emits
steps.note: Home immediately shows the latest episodes from the freshly-seeded library.
